metadata.title: (Let Me Be Your) Teddy Bear
metadata.lyrics:
[00:02.79] Baby, let me be your lovin' teddy bear
[00:08.34] Put a chain around my neck
[00:10.98] And lead me anywhere
[00:12.64] Oh, let me be (oh, let him be)
[00:15.05] Your teddy bear
[00:19.20] I don't wanna be your tiger
[00:21.90] 'Cause tigers play too rough
[00:24.55] I don't wanna be your lion
[00:27.24] 'Cause lions ain't the kind you love enough
[00:31.62] I just wanna be your teddy bear
[00:38.33] Put a chain around my neck
[00:40.97] And lead me anywhere
[00:42.56] Oh, let me be (oh, let him be)
[00:45.05] Your teddy bear
[00:49.20] Baby, let me be around you every night
[00:54.46] Run your fingers through my hair
[00:57.10] And cuddle me real tight
[00:58.99] Oh, let me be (oh, let him be)
[01:01.66] Your teddy bear
[01:05.49] I don't wanna be your tiger
[01:07.97] 'Cause tigers play too rough
[01:10.63] I don't wanna be your lion
[01:13.22] 'Cause lions ain't the kind you love enough
[01:17.88] Just wanna be your teddy bear
[01:24.37] Put a chain around my neck
[01:27.04] And lead me anywhere
[01:28.76] Oh, let me be (oh, let him be)
[01:30.92] Your teddy bear
[01:34.26] Oh, let me be (oh, let him be)
[01:36.89] Your teddy bear
[01:40.67] I just wanna be your teddy bear
[01:43.25] (Ooh)
[01:45.93]
